response.overview: In the lonely, quiet and boring city of Perth a surprise gathering occurs at the cities iconic cactus statue. spurred on by a social media post hundreds, young and old, flock to the cactus to pray to it in the hopes of receiving twenty dollars. A pessimistic narrator (voiced by Fletcher Wallbridge) tries to understand the meaning of the event and the psyche of the pilgrims.
response.title: Australia's Bizarre Cactus Cult
